\boxed{}
I agree with the prior conclusion that racemic epinephrine and intramuscular corticosteroids are appropriate for this child's moderate-to-severe croup. The evidence confirms that racemic epinephrine acts rapidly to reduce upper airway edema and improve airflow, while corticosteroids like dexamethasone suppress inflammation and shorten overall course of illness.
